item.title: It’s Coming Home − speech by Shoib Khan

rating.summary: Shoib Khan, Director of Insurance Supervision at the PRA, outlines plans for a new UK captive insurance regime expected to go live in mid-2027. The speech covers the historical context of captives in the UK, the regulatory design principles being considered, and the PRA's upcoming consultation paper. There is no discussion of monetary policy, interest rates, or the macroeconomic outlook.
rating.stance_rationale: This speech is entirely focused on prudential regulation and insurance supervision, specifically the development of a UK captive insurance framework. It contains no monetary policy content.
key_quotes: We expect the regime to go live in mid-2027.
If we get the framework right, and if we work together to make the regime a success, then, like the World Cup… it's coming home. Captives are coming home!
